title: ARSAT developed CryptoComm, a post-quantum cryptographic security system
summary: Argentina's state telecommunications company ARSAT announces CryptoComm, a post-quantum cryptography (PQC) system for secure messaging and file exchange, featuring a high-speed symmetric cipher and post-quantum key and digital-certificate generation, with a hardware version planned jointly with INVAP.

title: Secure communications: Quantum and Post-Quantum Methods 2022
summary: ARSAT page documenting a 2022 secure-communications initiative and conference on the threat quantum computing poses to public-key and symmetric cryptography, and ARSAT's development of quantum-resistant (post-quantum) communications methods for protecting government and national assets.
